cards.back: A technique to balance the dataset by creating additional copies of the minority class, increasing its representation in the dataset.
A technique to balance the dataset by removing samples from the majority class, decreasing its representation in the dataset.
A technique that generates new synthetic samples of the minority class by interpolating between existing samples, increasing its representation in the dataset.
A technique that randomly removes samples from the majority class, decreasing its representation in the dataset.
A technique that adjusts the cost of misclassification for each class, with a lower cost for misclassifying the minority class, to balance the dataset.
